why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:accept_code_of_conduct must dispatch from the official framed packet id to an accept-code-of-conduct body decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only and is separate from UI consent flow, legal acceptance semantics, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_accept_code_of_conduct_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 9, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration serverbound packet id 0x09.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ServerboundAcceptCodeOfConductPacket.INSTANCE, ServerboundAcceptCodeOfConductPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ServerboundAcceptCodeOfConductPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ServerboundAcceptCodeOfConductPacket.type().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration serverbound accept_code_of_conduct dispatch.

Current Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound mapping contains client_information id 0x00, finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, pong id 0x05, resource_pack id 0x06, select_known_packs id 0x07, and custom_click_action id 0x08, but not accept_code_of_conduct id 0x09.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x9 in Serverbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration serverbound accept_code_of_conduct packet id 9
